It helps to simplify a lot of processes and get much more value than basic HRIS. You don't need to pay for a subscription to a couple of solutions if you choose PeopleForce. Recommend

author: Przemysław R.

cons: Price is high, I lack some features from Bob.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Experience with PeopleForce: Streamlined and Efficient HR Management
description: The system meets the needs of the HR department in a comprehensive manner, providing a convenient and effective tool for managing all stages of the employee life cycle—from recruiting to ongoing support and development of staff. The integration process was seamless, and the PeopleForce team provided exemplary support at every stage of implementation. We commend their responsiveness to our requests and their ability to tailor the platform to our specific needs. The platform is consistently updated in line with current HR trends, and we are pleased with its development.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The intuitive interface allows for quick navigation, enabling users to efficiently access the necessary data and adapt to the system with minimal effort, even for those new to it. Process automation significantly reduces the time required for routine tasks. Integration with other systems allows for the seamless integration of PeopleForce with other HR tools, greatly simplifying the overall organization of work. PeopleForce enables the management of all stages of hiring, from the hiring process to onboarding of new employees. Technical support is available to address any questions or issues.
cons: We are happy to report that everything is going well. If we have any suggestions, we'll pass them on to the Peopleforce team and they'll take them into account.

review_title: I'm happy to work with this tool, and my team either
author: Galina M.
pros: When I looked for the new HRMS, I needed one that could be adjusted to the needs of my team, not the one telling me what our processes should look like. Facing the limitation of building or automating what I wanted to, I was impressed with the flexibility of peopleforce.io, where you can make whatever you need: access rights, automated flows, leave policies, recruitment process, and performance reviews can be configured precisely how you need them. Of course, you have to deal with the settings first, but new settings take just minutes once you understand how everything works. The UI is intuitive, so new users adapt very quickly. I also like the customer support and how the team hears feedback and offers improvements. I highly value Slack integration and multiple report options.
cons: There is always a field for improvement, and I constantly pass feedback to the support team and oversee how the team improves the product. Nothing critical at the moment. The integration with Slack could cover more functions, so I'm looking forward to the updates here.

review_title: The best ATS I can desire
description: Last but not least, talking with PoepleForce staff is always like talking to a colleague. They are effective, willing to help, cheerful and to the point. They are always there, helping out with every issue or raising improvements for you to the dev team when they spot something that can work better. I had the occasion to chat with the [SENSITIVE CONTENT] (they called me) and I had a blast talking about the product, what I like and dislike, how things may be impoved, but also chatting a bit about music and stuff. If that's not customer orientation, I don't know what it is...
author: Paolo P.
pros: I stumbled onto PeopleForce by a message on LinkedIn. I was actively searching for a new way to track applications. I had a process in place based on a board and a set of email templates and what I wanted was basically a simple, configurable tool to automate most of the tasks I was doing manually. PeopleForce fits like a glove. It's not overly engineered (in terms of process), it's configurable and it has just the right amount of automation. Basically I accelerated the same process I had in place tenfold, with some nice additions like the ability to leave scorecards for candidates, add tons of metadata and sending assessment tests. Beside the product, I really love the agile approach with this product: new features are baked in constantly, mostly by introducing small, frequent changes instead of releasing but disruptive ones. This makes for a product that's constantly improving, remaining familiar and usable all the time. May seem like a minor thing, but to me that's how products are supposed to be developed.
cons: The cons are to me pretty trivial. The interface and UI may need some more testing. No bugs to be found, just a bit of interactions that may be smoothen and visually speaking its good but not "OMG I'm in love". This is not a show stopper and I'm pretty sure it will improve over time. Despite the team is incredibly responsie to proposals from the customers, I had to wait a bit for some requests to be taken into account, but in the end everything was always delivered.

description: We use PeopleForce as the main ATS system for recruitment and HR. So far, I don’t see any competitors with such price and such functionality on the market
author: Oleksii B.
pros: I very much like recruiting module. I think there is a big potential to add new features and become one of the best ATS systems on the European market.
cons: I expect more recruiting features to come. The main cons for me are that I cannot fully edit all fields, filters, and reports and fit them into my organizational needs

description: People force helped us to step into more adult and structured HR. By using many functionalities if the product (time offs, suggestions, knowledge bases) we have slowly pushed the HR processes to the employees easely selling the functionality to them. For us people force is now important tool for communication, HR management, performrmance review etc
author: Inara M.
pros: Business processes are being implemented along with expansion of the product. We are purchasing it module by module. It is ease for use, our employees like the product. It helps us to be more structured and adult
cons: The only cons for us at the moment is the slow implementation of features in a roadmap. Being the Product company we understand why it is so however

description: We like to manage all HR processes in the system - recruiting, performance, personnel functions, time tracking, surveys.
author: Olha M.
pros: In our opinion, this system is the most optimal in terms of functionality, pricing, customization, updates and implementation of modern HR processes. Responsive technical support staff quickly and efficiently help to resolve any issue.
cons: We like everything. This system covered our needs in the form in which we wanted. There are no complaints about this, only thanks.

description: I love the platform. It saves a lot of time on daily HR things. The reporting system is very advanced and offers various options to track the scores.
author: Irina A.
pros: I love the display, it's simple and clear. You don't need to be a tech person to get around this platform. It's very user-friendly
cons: Birthdays and anniversaries reminders to be sent in SLack. So far this feature is not yet implemented. Sometimes we don't login into the platform every day to check the events and reminders would be super helpful.

review_title: HRCM i work with every day
description: overall i like it and do not plan to change
author: Polina K.
pros: helpfulness of BDM readiness to integrate our requests all in 1 with personal requests easiness to reach team
cons: speed of development customer support - sometimes just skip the request not wiling to help and find the option
